acceptOwnership(bytes32).details: Only the nominated owner can call this functionTransfers ownership from the current owner to the caller (nominee)The validator is added to pendingUpdatePoolSets to inform the consensus layerEmits OwnershipTransferred event

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

addDelegatorToWhitelist(bytes32,address).details: Only the validator owner can call this functionWhitelisted delegators can delegate even if the pool has restricted delegation

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to add to the whitelist
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

claimReward(bytes32).details: Only the delegator can claim their own rewardsTriggers CoinMinted event for reward distribution (platform-side minting) emit RewardClaimed Event with delegator address, poolId, and claimed amount emit CoinMinted Event with delegator address, reason code (1 for delegator rewards), and amount

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns._0: amount Amount of rewards claimed (and minted to the delegator)

compoundRewards(bytes32).details: Only the delegator can compound their own rewardsConverts unclaimed rewards into additional delegated stake emit RewardsCompounded Event with delegator address, poolId, and compounded amount

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

delegate(bytes32).details: The function is payable (msg.value is the amount of tokens to delegate)Requires the validator to have delegation enabled and the delegator to be in the whitelist (if enabled)The delegation takes effect at the next epoch emit StakeDelegated Event with delegator address, poolId, amount, and effective epoch

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns.poolIds: Array of all validator pool IDs

getCommissionRate(bytes32).details: Maximum rate is capped at MAX_COMMISSION_RATE (20% = 2000)

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to query
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

getDelegatorReward(bytes32,address).details: Uses lazy accounting to calculate rewards based on current reward-per-share

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to query
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns._0: Amount of unclaimed rewards (including both settled and unsettled rewards)

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to query
Address of the delegator to query

returns.totalClaimed_: Total rewards already claimed across all validators
returns.totalRewards_: Total unclaimed rewards across all validators
returns.totalStake_: Total amount of PROS staked across all validators

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to query

returns.poolIds: Array of pool IDs where the user has stakes
returns.rewards: Array of unclaimed rewards corresponding to each pool ID
returns.stakes: Array of stake amounts corresponding to each pool ID

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns.validator: Validator struct containing all validator details

getValidatorApr(bytes32).details: APR is calculated based on inflation rate and validator's share of total stake

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns.apr: Estimated annual percentage rate (scaled by 100, e.g., 500 = 5%)

returns.inactiveCount: Number of inactive validators (pending add but not yet active)

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

migrateV1ToV2().details: This function should be called during upgrade from V1 to V2 via upgradeToAndCall      It copies data from the old arrays to the new EnumerableSet structures      Can only be called once to prevent duplicate migrations

nominateOwner(bytes32,address).details: Only the current owner can call this functionThe nominated owner must explicitly call acceptOwnership to complete the transferEmits OwnerNominated event with current owner and nominated owner

params._newOwner: Address nominated to become the new owner
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

removeDelegatorFromWhitelist(bytes32,add.details: Only the validator owner can call this functionDoes not affect existing delegations from the removed address

params._delegator: Address of the delegator to remove from the whitelist
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

setCommissionRate(bytes32,uint256).details: Only the validator owner can call this functionThe new rate cannot exceed MAX_COMMISSION_RATE (20% = 2000 in scaled value)This limit prevents validators from setting exploitative commission rates emit CommissionRateChanged Event with poolId, old rate, and new rate

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

setDelegationEnabled(bytes32,bool).details: Only the validator owner can call this functionDisabling delegation prevents new delegations but does not affect existing ones

params._enabled: Boolean indicating if delegation should be enabled (true) or disabled (false)
params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

settleReward(bytes32).details: Updates the delegator's unclaimed rewards balance (lazy accounting)No events emitted (purely a state update for the delegator)

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

undelegate(bytes32).details: Only the delegator can call this function for their own stakeDoes not support partial undelegation (full stake only)Adds the delegator to the pending undelegation queue emit StakeUndelegated Event with delegator address, poolId, amount, and unlock epoch

params._poolId: Unique identifier of the validator's pool

returns.amount: Total amount to withdraw (stake + unclaimed rewards)
returns.unlockEpoch: Epoch number when the funds become withdrawable

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

acceptOwnership(bytes32).notice: Accepts ownership of a validator that has been nominated

addDelegatorToWhitelist(bytes32,address).notice: Adds a delegator to the validator's whitelist (if whitelist is enabled)

claimReward(bytes32).notice: Claims unclaimed rewards from a validator's pool for the caller

compoundRewards(bytes32).notice: Compounds unclaimed rewards into additional stake in a validator's pool

delegate(bytes32).notice: Delegates tokens to a validator's pool (for external delegators)

getActiveValidatorCount().notice: Returns the total number of active validators

getAllValidators().notice: Returns all validator pool IDs (active and inactive)

getCommissionRate(bytes32).notice: Returns the current commission rate for a validator's pool

getDelegator(bytes32,address).notice: Returns detailed information about a delegator's stake in a validator's pool

getDelegatorReward(bytes32,address).notice: Calculates the current unclaimed rewards for a delegator in a validator's pool

getTotalDelegatorCount().notice: Returns the total number of delegators across all active validator pools

getUserPendingUndelegations(address).notice: Returns all pending undelegations for a user

getUserTotalInfo(address).notice: Returns user's total staking information across all validators

getUserValidators(address).notice: Returns list of validators where the user has staked

getValidator(bytes32).notice: Returns detailed information about a validator

getValidatorApr(bytes32).notice: Returns the estimated APR for a validator's pool

getValidatorCounts().notice: Returns the count of validators by status

historicalRPS(uint256,bytes32).notice: Mapping from epoch to poolId to historical RPS data

migrateV1ToV2().notice: Migration function to migrate data from V1 arrays to V2 sets

nominateOwner(bytes32,address).notice: Initiates a two-step ownership transfer for a validator

pendingActivationEpoch(bytes32,address).notice: Tracks when each delegator's pending stake will activate

removeDelegatorFromWhitelist(bytes32,add.notice: Removes a delegator from the validator's whitelist (if whitelist is enabled)

setCommissionRate(bytes32,uint256).notice: Updates the commission rate for a validator's pool (fee taken from delegator rewards)

setDelegationEnabled(bytes32,bool).notice: Enables or disables delegation for a validator's pool

settleReward(bytes32).notice: Settles (calculates) unclaimed rewards for the caller from a validator's pool

undelegate(bytes32).notice: Initiates full undelegation from a validator's pool (withdraws stake + rewards)
